governance_note: Execution labels like aries-prod are subordinate specialist/task labels only. Persistent owners remain Jarvis, Forge, Signal, or Ledger.

failing_tests.name: runOpenClawLobsterWorkflow falls back to the local Lobster CLI when the gateway is unavailable

blockers.summary: Workflow catalog mappings disagree with the tested marketing pipeline contract.
Operational routes for onboarding/publish/calendar/integrations are still parity stubs.
Gateway-less local fallback regression fails during marketing-pipeline resume.
Route manifests/runtime docs lag the actual app + tests.

next_actions: Freeze the production workflow and route contract.
Resolve or demote stubbed UI-facing routes from the supported production surface.
After production freeze, derive local parity and fix the local Lobster fallback regression.
